violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee did not wash her hands before putting on gloves. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Microwave in the back kitchen was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee's opened beverage was found near the drink preparation area. Employee personal items should be stored separated from items used in food preparation for the facility.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Utensils were found stored in a dirty bin in the back kitchen. Clean utensils and equipment should be stored in a clean location.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
